app.subtitle: v1.0.6  |  Type 'help' to begin
tip.0: Tip: type 'ref' for a full command reference.
tip.1: Tip: use Tab to autocomplete commands.
tip.2: Tip: 'i create' to spin up a new instance.
tip.3: Tip: 'mod search <name>' to find mods on Modrinth.
tip.4: Tip: 'instance clone <name>' to duplicate an instance.
tip.5: Tip: 'auth status' to check your login state.
tip.6: Tip: 'set theme <name>' to change the colour theme.
tip.7: Tip: pass a name to 'i run <name>' to launch without selecting first.
tip.8: Tip: 'instance backup' to zip your world saves.
tip.9: Tip: 'mod profile save <name>' to snapshot your mod loadout.
tip.10: Tip: 'instance prism <path>' to import a Prism Launcher instance.
tip.11: Tip: 'auth login <alias>' to save a second Minecraft account.
tip.12: Tip: 'auth accounts' to see all signed-in accounts.
tip.13: Tip: 'instance mrpack' to export the active instance as a .mrpack.
settings.title: Settings
settings.recent_count_prompt: How many recent entries to show? (0 = off)
instance.worlds_none: No worlds found in this instance.
instance.wizard_cancel_hint: Type cancel at any prompt to quit this wizard.
instance.mojang_offline: Could not reach Mojang servers. Enter a version manually.
instance.mrpack_only: Only .mrpack files can be imported with this command.
instance.not_signed_in: Not signed in. Run 'login' to authenticate. (Required for client instances)
instance.low_ram_warning: allocated — modded instances may crash or lag. Consider increasing RAM in instance settings.
console.log_not_found: Log file not found yet — try again in a moment.
